item.title: It is what it is...
item.description:
After two years of being treated as he deserved, tiny octopus said, enough is enough. Just a quick edit. Tiny octopus' former job was a good one, which is why he said he was getting treated as he deserved. The pay was decent, the benefits were good for the corporate world, and the supervisor was a good chap. It was just too good of an opportunity to move to the civil service side with the benefits, union, pension and the PSLF program.
Went from contractor to full on civilian. GS-11 now with an increased step because he was recruited. Pay is about the same, but am now union with much better benefits. And a pension. Woo! Told the tiniers that their dad is now unemployed. At least until Tuesday when he steps onto the base as a CIV instead of a CTR.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: I Want to Believe... in my knitting skills!
item.description:
I wrote more on my insta: thread_and_roses, but long story short - I just finished my first colorwork knitting project! I probably should've gone with an easier pattern for my first, but rarely do I take the easy way out when it comes to crafting XD
It's super warm, too! I'd wear it every day if I weren't a farm worker lol
item.dc:creator: lunacane

item.title: Welcome to Gilead ....
item.description: They kept telling us we were overreacting when we said they would repeal Roe. Till now they are telling us we're overreacting when we say they will ban birth control. Fact is, many of the "rights" that people think they have are not specifically listed in the Constitution. And it's just a matter of time ....

item.title: MTG represents institutional decay
item.description: Made sure to add the politics tag for those that screen against it. If you're here to get an uplift, you don't need to see the bullshit some of us have to live.

item.title: They hadn't invented t-shirts yet
item.description: @OP PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE Put this link into the post - planetknowledge.tv is a fucking malwared cesspool of a site and shouldn't be viewed with enabled, maybe not at all. https://web.archive.org/web/20200420143539/https://planetknowledge.tv/2019/06/30/the-ornate-roman-iron-stylus-discovered-in-londinium/
item.dc:creator: Saturniidae

item.title: NGO Dump the First
item.description:
Herc was on a roll
The book is almost always better than the movie, but not in this case.
...That poison?
It's me. I'm this white man.
Sorry, this is a strictly 1% household.
I'd love for them to add a Goofy protecting his son arc to Kingdom Hearts.
Never compromise your artistic vision.
AND DIEEEEE
That's nothing, I work 12 to 15 hour days in my industry. If we're going for beers after, you and I probably just went through hell together.
Eat shit, bitch.
Cue rapturous applause.
Eat a heck.
Buddy tax. He was feeling very photogenic that day.
Thanks for sticking around to the end of the inaugural NGO Meme Dump! I'll be just going from the top of my camera roll to the bottom over time. It's gonna get weird. Decided to start participating in this community a bit more lately because darn if I don't just love it so much. You guys have brought me lots of laughter and joy these past 7 years and counting. In the spirit of that, I'd love to invite y'all to the NoGameOvers discord server. We mostly talk about the gaming industry and movies and the food we like to eat, so if that sounds like something that's up your alley, hop on in! I'd love to build a fun little community of like minded folk. But I do watch the server carefully, so behave yourselves you miscreants! https://discord.gg/q4uDBqK
item.dc:creator: NoGameOvers

item.title: Images of Note: I dally
item.description:
Soval was scared of humans because they were progressing so quickly.
FUCK THE LEGION!
They knew
Hell yeah
https://linuxmint.com/ * Free * Open Source * Extremely easy to use * Plenty of compatible software, including big names. * Steam with Proton allows you to play PC Games (like with SteamOS on Steam Dead). * Ubuntu Based (dead easy) * Three different flavours for different computer capabilities. Because fuck subscriptions for Windows 12.
:o
:C
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also doing a Q and A, come ask here: https://forms.gle/PjXAXxLVcA7iGSvz7
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's not stupid if it works. The people buying into it on the other hand...
item.dc:creator: 3PiecesOfBread

item.title: Learning how to smile again... my 1st before pic is to disgusting to show
item.description:
Trying them on before surgery
Right after surgery. Realizing i dont know how to smile showing teeth or smiling at all after years of covering face ( hence the beard mustache hiding it )
Still learning ... still very painful
The 1st smile i had in decades i was proud of ... im so lucky i was able to afford it. Being able to smile changes every moment of your life. I was so scared to do it ( phobia of dentist and being put under ) it was so worth it ... just cant wait to eat solid food again ... please dont hate to much for selfies. And please take care of your mouth it fucking sucks going through this. Just dont hesitate to ends justify the means
item.dc:creator: Leoso0
